_comment: Generated by build/scripts/generate_media_inventory.py - regenerate rather than hand-editing current_* fields. owner_facts / proposed_* / approval_status fields ARE meant to be edited (by agreement with the owner) and survive regeneration.

#21 Solid white oak hardwood floor installation and refinishing in Mission Hills San Diego. Rift and quartered select grade planks nailed down over tar paper, site finished with natural sealer and Bona satin polyurethane for a 100-year floor.

placements.project_or_section: #22 Mid-century solid oak strip floor refinishing and repair in Mission Hills San Diego near Kensington, North Park, South Park, Serra Mesa, Mission Valley, and Point Loma. A floor heater cutout was repaired with laced-in oak strips and the entire floor was refinished with a rich dark stain and traditional oil-based polyurethane for a seamless vintage restoration.﻿

placements.project_or_section: #23 Solid Richard Marshall walnut floor refinishing in a Bing Crosby Ranch estate near Rancho Santa Fe, 4S Ranch, and Carmel Valley San Diego. Originally prefinished with tung oil, the glued-down walnut was sanded flat to perfection, parquet entry and living room strips restored, and finished with a custom walnut stain and satin water-based polyurethane for flawless results.

placements.project_or_section: #24 Red oak hardwood floor refinishing in Carlsbad North County San Diego. Old orange 1980s oak with deep v-grooves and yellowed polyurethane was sanded clean with dust containment equipment, transformed with an off-white creamy stain and matte commercial-grade finish for a modern coastal look.

placements.project_or_section: #25 Solid white oak hardwood floor refinishing in Mission Hills San Diego. Three-quarter by two-and-a-quarter old growth planks and stairs were blackened and sun-faded from skylights, then restored with professional dustless sanding and sealed using modern non-yellowing water-based finishes for a bright, natural look built to last for decades.

placements.project_or_section: #27 Hardwood floor refinishing in Rancho Santa Fe and Bird Rock San Diego. The left photo shows a vintage rift and quartered solid red oak floor in a Fairbanks Ranch estate, restored with a custom beige stain that softened reds and yellows for a creamy modern look. The right photo shows a coastal Bird Rock rift and quartered white oak floor refinished with a clear sealer during a remodel overlooking the ocean, highlighting clean boards and natural grain.

placements.project_or_section: #37 Commercial bar and restaurant surface refinishing at Nobu inside the Hard Rock Hotel in downtown San Diego’s Gaslamp District. placements.current_alt: #37 Commercial bar and restaurant surface refinishing at Nobu inside the Hard Rock Hotel in downtown San Diego’s Gaslamp District. Sushi bar counters, tables, and bar tops were sanded, torched, and re-sanded to highlight burned grain, then sealed with floor-grade finish for unmatched durability in a high-traffic restaurant setting. — Before

placements.project_or_section: #38 Rancho Santa Fe hardwood floor refinishing at Fairbanks North estate. Solid 2¼″ × ¾″ rift and quartered select grade red oak floors sanded to perfection and finished with a custom beige stain and premium Bona finishing products for a timeless, elegant look.

placements.project_or_section: #39 Encinitas coastal hardwood floor refinishing in ocean view home. Exotic merbau floors with extreme sun fading and cupping were sanded flat with dust containment, sealed with oil to highlight the natural color, and finished with a durable commercial-grade coating.

placements.project_or_section: #40 Del Mar hardwood floor refinishing in Derby Downs coastal estate. Engineered red oak flooring worn out by the front entry was fully restored with professional sanding, a custom stain, and a satin sheen finish for a modern coastal look.﻿
